title: erysimum maculatum
intro: Erysimum maculatum, also known as woad or dyer's jet, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Erysimum maculatum has been found to have health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or salves for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
